name: Twilio
description: Official Twilio Labs MCP server for Send SMS and voice messages. Transport: stdio. Authentication: Twilio Account SID/API key/secret.

env.name: SID
env.description: Twilio credential used by the MCP server.

env.name: YOUR_ACCOUNT_SID
env.description: Twilio credential used by the MCP server.

env.name: YOUR_API_KEY
env.description: Twilio credential used by the MCP server.

env.name: YOUR_API_SECRET
env.description: Twilio credential used by the MCP server.
